description:
Configure Jenkins to display a formatted HTML system-wide announcement banner. Ensure the system is configured to support HTML markup and update the System Message with the following content:

Scheduled Maintenance Notice

Jenkins will undergo scheduled maintenance on Saturday, January 25, 2025 from 02:00 to 06:00 UTC.

  • All running builds will be suspended
  • Pipeline executions will be paused
  • Please plan your deployments accordingly

Contact: devops-team@company.com

Login credentials - Username: admin, Password: Admin123!
